scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-alpha.scss site/assets/theme-alpha.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-beta.scss site/assets/theme-beta.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-gamma.scss site/assets/theme-gamma.css
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
